title: stelis cyathiformis
intro: Stelis cyathiformis is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stelis cyathiformis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
